options.command: dry_run="{args.dryRun}"; version=$(node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const { parse } = require('yaml'); const chart = parse(fs.readFileSync('charts/kudeploy-controller/Chart.yaml', 'utf8')); if (!chart.appVersion) throw new Error('Missing charts/kudeploy-controller/Chart.yaml appVersion'); process.stdout.write(String(chart.appVersion));"); if [ "$dry_run" = "true" ] || [ "$NX_DRY_RUN" = "true" ]; then echo "[dry-run] docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 --push --tag ghcr.io/kudeploy/controller:$version --tag ghcr.io/kudeploy/controller:latest apps/controller"; else docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 --push --tag ghcr.io/kudeploy/controller:$version --tag ghcr.io/kudeploy/controller:latest apps/controller; fi
